info.title: gist
info.description: Run C# code gists directly using: dnx gist owner/gist[:path]

options.name: --dnx-aot
options.description:
Enable dotnet AOT defaults for run file.cs. Defaults to
false.
--dnx-alias ALIAS Assign an alias on first usage which can be used instead
of the full ref.

arguments.name: GIST_REF
arguments.description:
Reference to gist file to run, with format owner/gist[@commit][
:path]
@commit optional gist commit (default: latest)
:path optional path to file in gist (default: program.cs or
first .cs file)
